    【Safe Space】This dog fence provides a secure enclosed area for pets. The handle lock prevents pets from pushing the door open and escaping. With eight panels of sufficient height, it provides ample playing and resting space for small dogs.
  • 【Sturdy Material】The dog fence pen is made of heavy-duty metal with a coated finish, making it rust-proof, corrosion-resistant, and highly durable. It can withstand impact from pets and will not tip over, ensuring a long lifespan.
  • 【Portable Design】Each panel is connected by pillars and can be easily detached, making it convenient to carry. The foldable playpen is the best choice for pets to go outdoors, in the garden, RV camping, or traveling!
  • 【Multiple Sizes & Configurations】The animal pet exercise pen comes in 8-panel and 16-panel, with three sizes: 24"/32"/40", suitable for different-sized pets such as large medium small dogs, bunny, ducks, etc. Additionally, you can configure the fence into circular, rectangular, or irregular shapes according to different scenes and space sizes.
  • 【Installation & After-Sales】The installation instructions enable quick installation and dismantling of the puppy playpen indoor. If you have any questions about the product, please contact us promptly, and we will respond within 24 hours.
